headings.text: A working archive of long-form collaborations with cultural and scientific institutions.
A Wayfinding System for Four Centuries of Specimens
Translating Genomic Research for Public Audiences
Public Identity for a Deep-Field Survey Telescope
An Editorial System for Twelve Annual Exhibitions
Campus Wayfinding for a Living Research Estate
Data Dashboards for a Public-Facing Research Group
Identity & Annual Report for a Coastal Research Station
A Reading-First Digital Catalogue for 480,000 Titles
Strategy & Motion System for a Documentary Network

paragraphs.text: Each engagement begins with research and ends with a system that can be operated by the institution after we leave. Below: twelve recent projects, filtered by discipline.
Identity, signage, and a permanent digital companion guiding visitors through 38 galleries and 1.2 million catalogued objects.
A modular signage and digital map system spanning eleven buildings, six interior languages, and a 24-month phased rollout.
The full archive of forty-seven engagements is available on request, including confidential strategy work for three research universities and a national broadcaster. Request a private index →
A boutique brand strategy and digital experience agency for science, technology, and cultural institutions.
